title: Section 34
content: 1[34. Investment of funds.--The Financial Corporation may invest its funds in accordance with applicable guidelines and prudential norms as may be prescribed and in such securities as the Board may decide from time to time.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 39 of 2000, s. 21, for section 34 (w.e.f. 5-9-2000).
